nasb.text: The son of the Israelite woman blasphemed the Name and cursed. So they brought him to Moses. (Now his mother’s name was Shelomith, the daughter of Dibri, of the tribe of Dan.)

esv.text: and the Israelite woman’s son blasphemed the Name, and cursed. Then they brought him to Moses. His mother’s name was Shelomith, the daughter of Dibri, of the tribe of Dan.

cnv.text: 這以色列婦人的兒子褻瀆耶和華的名，咒詛耶和華的名，人就把他帶到摩西那裡。

ccb.text: 他竟说咒诅的话，亵渎了上帝的名，他们把他带到摩西那里。原来他母亲叫示罗密，是但支派示伯利的女儿。
